penalties.description: Multiple visible deviations from the marked circle line, particularly in frames 13-16 where cuts extend outside the circle boundary.

reasoning: Clear task completion is visible with the marked circle being cut out and released by frame 21. The gauze shows proper entry from an edge and complete circle separation. However, multiple segments of the cut path deviate outside the marked circle line, particularly visible in the middle and later phases of cutting. Timing was estimated based on standard frame progression assuming this represents approximately 200 seconds of activity.
